data.title: Wyoming buys shares in Bitcoin treasury company Strive
data.description: Wyoming has just disclosed its first purchase of shares in Bitcoin treasury firm Strive ASST. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Jump Crypto and Mainfold Trading received 4 million OPN market-making tokens, representing 2% of the initial circulating supply.
data.description: On-chain analyst Ai Yi posted on the X platform that the OPN Launchpool project will hold a token generation event (TGE) tonight. Jump Crypto received 2.5 million OPN market-making tokens, and Mainfold Trading received 1.5 million OPN market-making tokens, together accounting for 2% of the initial circulating supply. The two market makers have already deposited some tokens to exchanges, with the market-making addresses being 0x9eC1f2B052B4534B387C73C69b3e87324c1C7B21 and 0xf584F8728B874a6a5c7A8d4d387C9aae9172D621.

data.title: Elon Musk Supports JD Vance 2.0 Amid Uncertain Prospects
data.description: Elon Musk has thrown his support behind the political figure referred to as 'JD Vance 2.0.' Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the uncertainty surrounding this strategy's potential success. Musk's endorsement comes at a time when the political landscape is increasingly complex, and the effectiveness of such backing remains to be seen. Observers are keenly watching how this support might influence the broader political dynamics and whether it will translate into tangible outcomes for the candidate. The situation underscores the unpredictable nature of political endorsements and their impact on electoral success.

data.title: UK-Based Bitcoin Treasury Firm Joins FTSE Index
data.description: The Smarter Web Company (SWC), a Bitcoin treasury firm based in the UK, has been included in a UK FTSE index. According to NS3.AI, Odaily News reports that BitcoinTreasuries.NET has listed SWC as a new addition to the benchmark, recognizing it as a Bitcoin-focused treasury company.

data.title: Concerns Raised Over Bounty Payment by BC Game
data.description: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT posted on X expressing skepticism about whether BC Game will fulfill its promise to pay out a bounty. The comment was made in response to a discussion involving users @sosabby_eth and @bcgame. The conversation highlights ongoing concerns within the community about the reliability of bounty payments in the blockchain sector.

data.title: Pakistan Offers to Cease Operations Against Afghanistan Amid Terror Concerns
data.description: Pakistan's top military leader, Field Marshal Asim Munir, has expressed willingness to halt operations against Afghanistan if the Taliban government ceases its support for terror groups operating from its territory. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Munir's statement as a significant diplomatic gesture aimed at reducing tensions between the two nations. The offer comes amid ongoing concerns about the presence and activities of terrorist organizations in the region, which have been a source of instability and conflict. Pakistan's stance reflects its strategic interest in fostering regional peace and security, contingent upon Afghanistan's cooperation in addressing the issue of terrorism. The development marks a potential turning point in the relationship between Pakistan and Afghanistan, with implications for broader regional dynamics.

data.title: Azerbaijan Protests Iranian Drone Incident
data.description: Azerbaijan's Foreign Ministry announced on Thursday that two Iranian drones crossed the border into the Azerbaijani exclave of Nakhchivan, resulting in injuries to two individuals. According to Ming Pao, Azerbaijan has lodged a formal protest with the Iranian embassy in Baku regarding the incident. The ministry emphasized that Azerbaijan reserves the right to take appropriate countermeasures against Tehran.

data.title: North Korean Leader Kim Jong-un Inspects New Destroyer
data.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong-un inspected the new destroyer "Choe Hyon" from Tuesday to Wednesday. According to Ming Pao, Kim Jong-un oversaw a strategic cruise missile test from the destroyer and discussed the training of the crew with officials.

data.title: Health System Crisis Becomes Central Issue in Colombian Election Campaign
data.description: The death of Kevin, a child with hemophilia, has sparked widespread outrage in Colombia. Bloomberg posted on X that the incident, along with President Gustavo Petro's response, has turned the healthcare system crisis into a key topic in the ongoing electoral campaign. The tragedy has highlighted significant challenges within the country's medical infrastructure, drawing attention from both political leaders and the public. As the election approaches, candidates are increasingly focusing on healthcare reform as a major campaign issue, aiming to address the deficiencies exposed by Kevin's case. The situation underscores the urgent need for improvements in the healthcare system, which has become a pivotal concern for voters.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with SBET down 1.23%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with BMNR up 0.62%, SBET down 1.23%, MSTR down 0.29%, CRCL down 0.11%, and COIN down 0.21%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Germany's Foreign Minister States Non-Involvement in Iran Regime Change Actions
data.description: Germany's Foreign Minister has declared that the country will not participate in any specific actions aimed at achieving regime change in Iran. According to Jin10, this statement reflects Germany's stance on maintaining diplomatic relations and avoiding interference in Iran's internal affairs. The announcement comes amid ongoing international discussions regarding Iran's political situation and nuclear activities. Germany continues to advocate for peaceful resolutions and diplomatic engagement with Iran, emphasizing the importance of stability in the region.

data.title: India's Infrastructure Bank Plans $500 Million Equity Fund
data.description: India’s National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development is reportedly preparing to raise approximately $500 million for its inaugural equity-focused fund. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter, that the bank aims to bolster its investment capabilities in infrastructure projects across the country. This move is part of a broader strategy to enhance infrastructure development and attract more private investment into the sector. The fund is expected to target a range of infrastructure projects, potentially boosting economic growth and development in India.

data.title: EU Urges US to Respect Trade Agreement with Spain
data.description: The European Union's High Representative for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy, Kallas, emphasized the importance of the United States respecting the trade agreement reached in June, which applies to all member states. According to Jin10, Kallas highlighted the significance of maintaining strong trade relations between the EU and the US, particularly concerning agreements involving Spain. The EU is keen on ensuring that the terms agreed upon are upheld to foster mutual economic benefits and cooperation.

data.title: Amundi, KKR, and Temasek Compete for United Overseas Bank's Asset Management Division
data.description: Amundi, KKR, and Temasek's Seviora unit are reportedly among the contenders for acquiring United Overseas Bank's asset management arm. Bloomberg posted on X, citing unnamed sources familiar with the matter. The sale process, which is still in its early stages, has attracted interest from several prominent financial firms. United Overseas Bank is seeking to divest its asset management division as part of a strategic review aimed at optimizing its business operations. The potential acquisition is expected to enhance the buyer's portfolio and expand their presence in the asset management sector. Further details regarding the transaction have not been disclosed, and the involved parties have yet to comment on the matter.

data.title: Solana Surges 14% Amid Rising Network Demand
data.description: Solana (SOL) has experienced a significant 14% increase in the past 24 hours, breaking out of a four-week consolidation phase to trade around $90.5, surpassing the $88 support level. According to NS3.AI, the Solana network has seen a 17% rise in daily new addresses over the last two weeks, increasing from 7.42 million to 8.7 million, indicating growing demand. Despite this positive trend, whale holdings of over 100,000 SOL have slightly decreased. Maintaining a position above $88 could potentially lead to a price movement towards $97–$105, whereas a drop below this level might weaken the bullish outlook.

data.title: Trader Machi Big Brother Increases Long Position with Additional 100 ETH
data.description: Trader Machi Big Brother has expanded his long position by adding 100 ETH, according to data from Hyperbot. This move brings the total value of the position to $14.56 million. According to NS3.AI, the position currently holds an unrealized profit of approximately $245,000.

data.title: Ray Dalio Reaffirms Gold's Superiority Over Bitcoin
data.description: Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio has reiterated his strong bullish stance on gold, emphasizing its superiority over Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Dalio highlighted gold's irreplaceable status and recommended that individual portfolios allocate 5% to 15% in gold to mitigate risk during crises.

data.title: Venice to Introduce Privacy Protection Feature
data.description: Venice founder Erik Voorhees announced that the platform is set to launch a new verifiable privacy protection feature. According to NS3.AI, Voorhees emphasized that Venice does not currently store user prompts or responses, highlighting the platform's commitment to user privacy.

data.title: Foreign media reports: Iran's willingness to abandon nuclear weapons in exchange for peace is beginning to emerge, causing crude oil prices to fall.
data.description: According to Sky News Arab, Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister stated, "Iran is prepared to abandon its nuclear program if the United States can provide a satisfactory alternative." Yesterday, reports surfaced that Iran had been secretly contacting the United States to reach an agreement and end the conflict, but Iran subsequently denied these reports as false. In short, these are clear signs of de-escalation, and investors may only need to wait for the United States or Israel to announce that their goals have been achieved to see the market rejoice. Following the Deputy Foreign Minister's comments, the market reacted positively, with stocks jumping while the dollar and oil prices fell. (Jinshi)

data.title: Primark Appoints CEO Amid Potential Spinoff
data.description: Primark has announced the appointment of its new CEO as the company considers a potential spinoff. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move as Primark navigates its future business plans. Meanwhile, Senior has received another takeover proposal, indicating ongoing interest in the company. As the day unfolds, industry insiders are also discussing the top Oscar films to watch, providing a cultural touchpoint amid business developments.
